Why Me

Mission & Purpose

What Drives My Work

To awaken the infinite intelligence that resides within the soul's spark and support mankind in reclaiming its original genetic code.

After 20 years on a personal growth and spiritual journey, I awoke in the middle of the night undergoing a DNA remembrance procession. As this occurred, I transcended the consciousness of the Earth plane and became one with the creative essence of All That Is. Primordial sound, a form of light language, instantly activated, and from then on out, my expanded training with the Universe and various lifeforms and intelligences began.

"The higher the highs, the lower the lows, until we find the balancing point is the portal of love."
20+ Years on Spiritual Journey
2,000 Email Subscribers
Global Audience Reach
6 Core Topics
Core Topics

Conversations That Transform

All of my work, the frequency, and the words within are channelled to meet the podcast host and audience where they are at so that they may experience real shifts and anchorings on the calls.

01

Moving Beyond Old World Systems into New Earth Timelines

We discuss what New Earth timelines are, why and how they exist, and why it is imperative for us as individuals and a species to shift frameworks. We discuss how to move forward, how to come to completion with the past, and why shifting frameworks is essential to ensure the evolution of the human race. If appropriate for the audience, we'll use light language to assist with shifting vibrational fields and aligning with New Earth timelines.

Light Language Included
02

How to Heal the Heart

We'll guide people out of the conditioned state of separation and position them towards acceptance, allowance, and forgiveness of Self and others. We speak of the nature of the higher heart, how to connect to the songlines of it, and how to move through portals to create timeline shifts for an individual's own life. I share powerful personal experiences with the coding of self-forgiveness to highlight a palpable current of energy that we have access to that has been spoken about in ancient texts such as the Bible (non-religious perspective).

Higher Heart Realms
03

Water's Wisdom and Its Eternal Code

As founder of LifeFX Living Water Droplets™, I've become aware of how to encode water with frequency so that it will assist people with their awakening journey. We've uncovered deep wells of energy that exist within the water molecule itself that vibrate at the frequency of eternal light. This conversation paves the way for sales of LifeFX Living Water Droplets™ and the course "Sovereign Blood, Sovereign Water, Free Will & Intent." We offer a 20% commission on purchased products through the host's affiliate link.

Affiliate Available
04

What is Light Language and How Does it Work?

In this conversation we explore interspacial dynamics of reality and how sound and frequency can bypass conventional modes of healing. We dive into what light codes are, where they come from, and how to access your own. A clearing and activation for your audience is also recommended if you wish. The goal is to open the doorway for instant access to the heart and the goodness that sits inside.

Live Activation
05

The Deep Dark Interdimensional Web

This is a conversation for those audiences who are intellectually curious about how reality is run. We dive into the leading edge toxic energies on the planet that are consuming soul light and how we as individuals and a species navigate away from them. This conversation is a reality check. It does not separate "us" from "them", but opens the doorway to the heart where we as individuals change trajectories within our alignments.

Advanced
06

Loving Yourself Back to Life

We discuss heart healing, how to heal from trauma, moving beyond pain, and accessing realities where the future version of yourself already exists. This conversation is best had with an audience that would like to participate with Q&A. We will assist them in accessing their innate potential to move beyond heartache and pain.

Interactive Q&A

Background & Credibility

The Journey

From DNA Remembrance to Global Guidance

After 20 years on a personal growth and spiritual journey, I awoke in the middle of the night undergoing a DNA remembrance procession. As this occurred, I transcended the consciousness of the Earth plane and became one with the creative essence of All That Is. Primordial sound, a form of light language, instantly activated, and from then on out, my expanded training with the Universe and various lifeforms and intelligences began.

I work with clients in 1:1 and group settings to ensure their timelines connecting with New Earth are intact.

Key Achievements

  • Created a portal within water to assist people in awakening their genetic code, bottled within LifeFX Living Water Droplets™
  • Trained with inter-galactic and inter-dimensional energies to understand how they function on the Earth plane
  • Trained in the holographic nature of reality; able to see with the naked eye the inter-dimensional insets placed within reality
  • Shown the holographic nature of fear and how it works within water, with photo and video documentation

Unique Experiences

Mother's passing at 10 years old
Legs crushed between two passenger vans at 20. Lost idealized version of the feminine form as one leg was degloved
Integration of the Higher Self at 40
Heartbreak catalyzing a renewed view of awakening
Interdimensional journeys to the framework of "hell" to encourage people to make amends
Experiencing the matrix shift in real time
Entity extractions
Working with clients to restore timelines of grace
Never used plant medicine. All experiences are through integrated consciousness alone

Audience Reach

Who We Serve

Ideal Audience

Awakening or awakened populations interested in truth-seeking, spiritual awakening, healing, and individual and collective enlightenment. They are ready to move beyond emotional baggage and distortions.

They haven't figured out what light codes are yet and are excited for something different, or they know about light codes and want efficient, fast, effective change. Or they are well-intentioned, light giving individuals and healers that require reality checks on how to discern, navigate inter-dimensional reality, and shift timelines so they are living their optimal lives on planet Earth.

Problems they face: Looking to heal and/or evolve from trauma, anger, resentment, betrayal, loss, or significant life events. They can't make sense of the world around them and are facing fear due to global control and world events. They want to heal but have been unable to come to terms with the past.

2,000 Email List
Global Reach

FAQ

Common Questions

What interview length do you prefer?
I prefer interviews between 75-90 minutes. This allows enough time for deep exploration of the topics while also providing space for audience interaction and light language activations if appropriate.
Are you open to live podcasts?
Yes, I am absolutely open to live podcasts. I love the raw, unfiltered energy of live recordings and the opportunity to engage with audiences in real-time.
What platform do you prefer for interviews?
Zoom is my preferred platform for interviews. It's reliable and allows for good audio quality, which is essential when working with light language and frequency-based content.
Do you offer affiliate opportunities?
Yes! For conversations around Water's Wisdom and LifeFX Living Water Droplets™, we offer a 20% commission on purchased products through the host's affiliate link. This also applies to the course "Sovereign Blood, Sovereign Water, Free Will & Intent."
Are there topics you won't discuss?
No. I am open to discussing any topic that serves the audience's highest good. However, I always ensure the conversation meets the audience where they are at, creating a safe container for exploration.
What is your time zone?
I am based in Brisbane, Australia (AEST). I am flexible with timing to accommodate international hosts and audiences.
